---
name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: "Propose an architectural expansion, AI upgrade, or layout enhancement."
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: ["enhancement", "proposal"]
assignees: []
---

## 💡 Operational Enhancement Idea
Please provide a high-level summary of the proposed feature. What problem does this solve or what value does it add for recruiters and users?

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution
Describe how this feature should be implemented inside the Digital OS/portfolio hierarchy:
- **Visual Design**: (e.g., retro terminals, new tab layout, visual graphs)
- **Data Collections**: (e.g., Firestore schema, local state buffers)
- **Operational Integration**: (e.g., new button CTA, admin deck settings panel)

## 🔀 Alternatives Evaluated
Describe any alternative layouts, third-party libraries, or designs you evaluated prior to submitting this proposal and why they were rejected.

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any secondary notes, layout drawings, or references that support the integration of this feature.
